title: Ability to change the status of a mirrored column in a board embedded in a doc

posts.author: OfficeHounds (Maggie Langley)
posts.cookedHtml:
When a board is embedded in a Doc, make it possible to change the status of mirrored columns instead of just viewing them.

Currently, we can click on the column to see the list but can’t change the status.

It is possible to change a mirrored date column, but not a status.
